items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，但光看参数没用，能不能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: ELSA3D: Elastic Semantic Anchoring for Unified 3D Understanding and Generation
items.title_cn: ELSA3D ：用于统一3D理解和生成的弹性语义锚定
items.summary: Unified 3D foundation models aspire to generate 3D assets and reason about them in language within a single backbone, but their text-3D interaction remains largely implicit. Existing methods concatenate text and 3D tokens into a flat sequence and rely on self-attention, collapsing coarse structural ...
items.summary_cn: 统一的3D基础模型渴望在单个骨干中以语言生成3D资产并进行推理，但它们的文本3D交互在很大程度上仍然是隐含的。现有的方法将文本和3D令牌连接成一个平坦的序列，并依赖于自我注意，折叠粗糙的结构...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Graph Convolutional Attention: A Spectral Perspective on Graph Denoising and Diffusion
items.title_cn: 图卷积注意：图去噪和扩散的光谱视角
items.summary: Denoising graphs is a fundamental problem in graph learning and the core operation of graph diffusion models. Attention-based architectures like graph transformers have recently shown promise in denoising graphs. However, our principled understanding of attention-based graph denoising remains limite...
items.summary_cn: 图的去噪是图学习中的一个基本问题，也是图扩散模型的核心操作。基于注意力的架构（如图形变换器）最近在图形去噪方面显示出前景。然而，我们对基于注意力的图去噪的原则性理解仍然有限...
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，Graph这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: Rethinking Indic AI from a Lens of Cultural Heritage Preservation
items.title_cn: 从文化遗产保护的角度重新思考印度人工智能
items.summary: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) makes inroads into different parts of the Indian subcontinent, there is significant interest in studying how AI impacts the linguistic and cultural foundations of this civilization. AI is seen as a ''double-edged sword'' where on the one hand, it can enable access and...
items.summary_cn: 随着人工智能（ AI ）进入印度次大陆的不同地区，人们对研究AI如何影响这种文明的语言和文化基础非常感兴趣。人工智能被视为一把“双刃剑” ，一方面，它可以实现访问和...
items.comment: 学术界的新尝试，能否转化为实用产品？时间会给出答案。

items.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Anthropic's Latest Model
items.title_cn: Claude 3.5十四行诗- Anthropic的最新型号
items.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet with improved reasoning and coding capabilities.

items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model
items.title_cn: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI的成本效益模型
items.summary: OpenAI launches GPT-4o Mini, offering high performance at lower cost.
items.summary_cn: OpenAI推出GPT-4o Mini ，以更低的成本提供高性能。
items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash - Google's Fast Model

items.summary_cn: 谷歌发布了Gemini 1.5 Flash ，以实现更快的推理和更低的成本。
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，价格先准备好——按token计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。
